label: The Pallid Reliquary
description: The Pallid Reliquary operates as a compact tradehouse set into a vaulted gallery of Pale Meridian Enclave, its frontage sealed behind blast-rated shutters and a narrow transaction grille. Ration-tin shelving and pressure-clamped vitrines organize goods for rapid lock-down, while a recessed counter is backed by stamped ledgers and cog-marked inventory plaques. Lumen strips recessed into the ferrocrete ribs cast a cold, even light that leaves no corner unsearched. A faint tang of machine oil and preservative salts lingers in the air, reflecting the enclave’s siege economy and sealed circulation.
